dialogos.texto_en: (When we got on the Ferris wheel,\n the sun had already started to set.)
(As we were waved off by the attendant,\n the gondola slowly began to rise up.)
(Outside the window, beyond the cityscape,\n the golden sea sparkled, reflecting the sunlight.)
(But neither I nor Nino\n had the luxury of enjoying such a breathtaking view.)
Okay, let me go first.\nIt's better that way, right?
I understand.
I'll just ask you directly.\nSince today... No, wait... Yesterday afternoon, right?\nYour behavior has been strange, Futaro, but%p-2;――
Is that because of me?
WHA%p-2;――%p;?!\nNo, why would it be because of you?
Why, you say%p-2;――
Why's what I want to ask you!\nI mean, if your behavior is weird, Futaro,\nthen it's definitely because of me!
That's totally\nwhy you would become like that!\nThere's no other reason!
W-wait...
And, there's something I realized too.
Huh? Something you realized%p-2;――
We're gonna finish my part of the talk first, okay?\nCome on, answer me.\nWhy were you acting weird?
Oh, that...
(It's so pathetic to speak honestly here. \n But I can't hide it from Nino%p-2;――%p;)
(More than anything, I can't deceive her here.\n For the sake of our future.)
(In the end, I find myself relying on Nino once again,\n but compared to our future together,\n my pride doesn't matter at all!)
Am I suitable for you?
Huh?
I think you're incredibly...attractive,\nto the point where I feel...unworthy of you.\nI realized that during this trip.
I don't understand why someone like you\nwould confess to someone like me...who\ncan't even handle romantic relationships properly.
So, to be pathetically honest,\nI was worried that one day\nyou'd get tired of me...
I wanted you to see me\nin a new light,\nto show you the kind of man I am.
But, everything I tried ended in failure...
*sigh*
You're ridiculous!\nYou were worrying about something like that?
H-hey, Nino?!\nYou're so close...!
Listen, Futaro.\nFeelings are something that can change.
Huh?\nWh-what do you mean?
(Is she already tired of me?\n Did she invite me here to break up with me?!)
Think back\nto when we first met.
I've given you a hard time since then, haven't I?
I can't forget that, even if I wanted to.\nYou were quite something.
My feelings have changed enough to confess\nto someone I used to hate so much.
It's better to think that people's feelings can change. \nIn fact, there's nothing that doesn't change.
Well, there's an exception.\nMy feelings towards you, Futaro, will never change.
My feelings for you are the result of the changes\nand guidance that you have brought to my life.
On the other hand,\nthere might be other feelings that could change.
That's why I'm also anxious.\nIt's not just you, Futaro.
Did I make you anxious after all?
I wouldn't say anxious, but more like emotions\nthat would come with being your girlfriend.
Hey, you know what, Futaro?\nYou're a really attractive person for me,\nyou know? Just hard to read.
Once I understood you,\nI fell in love with you in no time.
Even though Miku and Ichika are still around,\nI don't know how many more rivals there'll be\nif you go to Tokyo.
That's why I'm always worried, you know?\nThat someone might take you away from me, Futaro.
N-no way, isn't that a bit of a stretch?\nI'm not that kind of person.
It's an issue that you don't even realize.
Thinking I was the only one on this earth\nwho would fall in love with a guy like you\nwas a big mistake.
But that's why I can't be at ease even\nif you confess to me or I confess to you.
I'll always be the one making the moves,\nso you should keep making moves on me too.\nThere's no time to be anxious, you know?
Nino...
(That's right.\n This is Nino.)
(She always shows me new ideas and\n shows me a new world.)
(And it's not just that.\n Even for things that seem obvious,\n she makes me pay attention to them.)
(Because Nino is like that, I...)
Hey, Nino.
What?
Thanks for fulfilling my wish back then.
Your wish...
That...I want to discover a new world with you.
You've also done your best to stay with me\nfor as long as possible.\nThank you.
And, I'm excited for our relationship\nfrom here on out.
Me too.
You know,\nit's important to have conversations like this.\nWe can't rely on just being in a romantic relationship.
I agree.\nWe need to be aware that we are separate individuals.
But we can get to the point where we can communicate\nwithout words, right?
Even though we are different individuals,\ncompromising with each other,\nwe can understand each other's feelings.
Do you understand how I feel right now?\nIf you don't, please ask me.\nI will answer if you ask.
Nino...
I've learned a lot.\nThere's still so much I've got to pick up\nwhen it comes to love.
I'm in the same boat as you.\nLet's take the next step together,\njust the two of us, forever.
Even if there are things I can't understand alone,\nif we tackle them together,\nwe'll surely find the answer.
Ah, you're right.
Yeah. I've fallen in love again because of it.
Um.
Aah, no, um, just now was...
That's how you were thinking?
Th-that's right!
You always lead me, show me the way,\nsomething like that...
That's why I cling on so desperately to you, Nino,\nso that I won't lose you.\nEven if I can't handle it...and it's uncool.
Futaro...
Hey, Futaro.\nWhat do we do from now on?\nEveryone might be here already.
Can't we...be alone a little longer?
Yeah.\nI guess it's okay for a little.
Teehee!\nHow about we go somewhere, just the two of us?
That's not a good idea.\nWe would worry everyone.
Yeah, that's true.\nIt's a shame though.
But...
Hey, Futaro. I said it earlier, right?\nThat I realized something.
Oh, that.\nI wanted to hear about that, too.\nWhat is it that you realized?
Didn't I bother you, Futaro?
Huh?
I went to your room at night, right, Futaro?\nI wondered if that caused you some trouble.
But, I wanted to make some memories.
You're going to Tokyo, Futaro.\nWe won't be able to be together all the time anymore.\nSo...in my own way, I decided to make a move on you.
But if you didn't feel that way,\nI might have just bothered you.
No, you didn't cause me any trouble.\nIt was a bit difficult, well, in a sense it was\na bit troubling, but not really... I guess.
I also want to have memories with you.
Is that so? How nice.
Then...right here...
(Does Nino...maybe want to do it too?)
Futaro...
(Here, no one is watching, no one is bothering us.\n I can kiss Nino...!)
EEEEP!
UWAA!
O-oh my?\nIt looks like we've already completed one round,\nwe need to get off.
Y-yeah.\nIt went by in a flash, hahaha...
(Oh come ON, the mood was just getting good!\n Can't this Ferris wheel go a little slower?!?!)
